<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->
- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created. (done)

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements (Laravel 11.x, MySQL, project name: laravel_test)

- [x] Scaffold the Project (Laravel 11.x via Docker)

- [x] Customize the Project (Cafe manager CRUD)

- [x] Install Required Extensions (no extensions needed)

- [x] Compile the Project (Docker image built)

- [x] Create and Run Task (not needed)

- [x] Launch the Project (docker compose up -d)

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete (README updated, comments removed)

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
